text: Hey Jarvis, run through my schedule for today, please.
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, November 23. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've mapped the locations. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 2-1! Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sounds exciting! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the kitchen sink area has a problem. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
